---
title: "List of Publications" 
---

## Submitted (available in bioR$\color{Maroon}{\chi}$*iv*)

**Oliver James** and Kim, Y. J. (2025), "Gain-controlled reconfiguration of long-range coupling explains visibility-dependent spatiotemporal neural coding dynamics'', Submitted, Sep. 2025 <https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2025.09.24.677967v1>

## ar$\color{Maroon}{\chi}$iv

**Oliver James**, and Heung-No Lee. (2025). "Concise probability distributions of eigenvalues of real-valued Wishart matrices", Retrieved from <http://arxiv.org/abs/1402.6757>

**Oliver James**, and Heung-No Lee. (2025). "Restricted isometry random variables: probability distributions, RIC prediction and phase transition analysis for Gaussian encoders", Retrieved from <https://arxiv.org/abs/1410.1956>

## In Preparation

Miguel Sanchez-Valpuesta, **Oliver James**, Joonyeol Lee and Gunsoo Kim, "Effects of locomotion on the population frequency representation in the mouse auditory midbrain'', **Writing stage, 2026**.

**Oliver James** and Sung Ho Hong, (2026). "Container-based framework for simulating biological cerebellar neural networks", **Writing stage, 2026.**

## Published {#sec-journals}

1.  Youngbeom Lee, **Oliver James**, Koeun Jung, Doyun Lee, and Yee Joon Kim. “Hierarchical summary statistics encoding across primary visual and posterior parietal cortices”, Accepted in **Advanced Science**: Feb. 27, **2026**.

2.  Jea Kwon, Sunpil Kim, Junsung Woo, Keiko Tanaka-Yamamoto, **Oliver James**, Erik De Schutter, Sungho Hong, and C. Justin Lee, \`\`Cerebellar tonic inhibition orchestrates the maturation of information processing and motor coordination'', **Experimental and Molecular Medicine**. (Online: https://doi.org/10.1038/s12276-026-01657-8), 18. Feb. **2026**.

3.  Jisub Bae, Koeun Jung, **Oliver James**, Satoru Suzuki, and Yee Joon Kim. \`\`Frontal engagement in perceptual integration under low subjective visibility'', **NeuroImage**, 305, 120984, Feb. **2025**.

4.  Jongrok Do, **Oliver James**, and Yee Joon Kim. \`\`Choice-dependent delta-band neural trajectory during semantic category decision making in the human brain'', **iScience**, 27(7), 110173, 19 July **2024**.

5.  Jongrok Do, Kang Yong Eo, **Oliver James**, Joonyeol Lee, and Yee Joon Kim. \`\`The representational dynamics of sequential perceptual averaging'', **Journal of Neuroscience**, 42(6), 1141–1153, 09 Mar. **2022**.

6.  Adalarasu, K., Jagannath, M., and **Oliver James**.. \`\`Assessment of techniques for teaching school children with autism'', **Innovation and Research in BioMedical engineering**, 41(2), 88–93, 1 Apr. **2020**.

7.  **Oliver James**, HyunJin Park, and SeongGi Kim. \`\`Impact of sampling rate on statistical significance for single subject fMRI connectivity analysis'', **Human Brain Mapping**, 40(11), 3321–3337, 1 Aug. **2019**.

8.  Bo-yong Park, Won Mok Shim, **Oliver James**, and Hyunjin Park. \`\`Possible links between the lag structure in visual cortex and visual streams using fMRI'', **Scientific Reports**, 9(1), 4283, 12 Mar. **2019**.

9.  Kang Yong Eo, **Oliver James**, Sangkyu Son, Min-Suk Kang, Sang Chul Chong, Yee-Joon Kim. \`\`Representational dynamics of ensemble average of simultaneously presented objects'', **Journal of Vision**, 18(10), 80–80, 18 May **2018**.

10. Junhwan Kwon, Moonseok Kim, Hyejin Park, Bok-Man Kang, Yongjae Jo, Jae-Hwan Kim, **Oliver James**, Seok-Hyun Yun, Seong-Gi Kim, Minah Suh and Myunghwan Choi, \`\`Label-free nanoscale optical metrology on myelinated axons in vivo'', **Nature Communications**, 8(1), 1832, 28 Nov. **2017**.

11. Yubu Lee, Bo-Yong Park, **Oliver James**, Seong-Gi Kim, Hyunjin Park. \`\`Autism spectrum disorder related functional connectivity changes in the language network in children, adolescents and adults'', **Frontiers in Human Neuroscience**, 11, 418, 18 Aug. **2017**.

12. **Oliver James**. \`\`Revisiting the RIP of Real and Complex Gaussian Sensing Matrices Through RIV Framework'', **Wireless Personal Communications**, 87(10), 513–526, 12 Oct. **2015**.

13. **Oliver James**. \`\`Stability Analysis of LASSO and Dantzig Selector via Constrained Minimal Singular Value of Gaussian Sensing Matrices'', **International Journal of Computer Applications**, 975, 8887, 1 May **2015**.

14. **Oliver James**, Woong-Bi Lee, Sang-Jun Park, and Heung-No Lee. \`\`Evaluation of Resolution Improvement Ability of a DSP Technique for Filter-Array-Based Spectrometers'', **The Journal of Korean Institute of Communications and Information Sciences**, 38(6), 497–502, 30 June **2013**.

15. **Oliver James**, Woong-Bi Lee and Heung-No Lee, \`\`Filters with random transmittance for improving resolution of filter-array-based spectrometers", **Optics Express**, 21 (4), pp. 3969-3989, 11 Feb. **2013**.

16. **Oliver James**, R. Aravind and K.M.M. Prabhu, \`\`Improved least squares channel estimation for orthogonal frequency division multiplexing", **IEE Signal Processing**, 6 (1), pp. 45-53, 03 Feb. **2012**.

17. **Oliver James**, Woong-Bi Lee, Sang-Jun Park and Heung-No Lee, \`\`Improving resolution of miniature spectrometers by exploiting sparse nature of signals", **Optics Express**, 20 (3), pp. 2613-2625, 12 Jan. **2012**.

18. **Oliver James**, R. Aravind and K.M.M. Prabhu, \`\`Krylov subspace-based low-rank channel estimation in OFDM systems", **Signal Processing**, 90 (6), pp. 1861-1872, 16 Dec. **2009**.

19. **Oliver James**, R. Aravind and K.M.M. Prabhu, \`\`Sparse channel estimation in OFDM systems by threshold-based pruning", **IEE Electronics letters**, 44(13), pp. 830-832, 19 June **2008**.

## Book Chapters

1.  Umapathy, K., Muthukumaran, D., Chandramohan, S., Sivakumar, M., **Oliver James** (2023). Low Power Methodologies for FPGA—An Overview. In: Sharma, D.K., Sharma, R., Jeon, G., Polkowski, Z. (eds) **Low Power Architectures for IoT Applications. Springer Tracts in Electrical and Electronics Engineering.** Springer, Singapore. https://doi.org/10.1007/978-981-99-0639-0_4

## Conferences

1.  **Oliver James** and Yee Joon Kim, (2023) On the representation of objective and subjective visible/invisible stimuli in humans via EEG-based report and no- report, Cognitive Neuroscience Symposium, CNS, SFA, USA
2.  Jisub Bae, **Oliver James,** and Yee Joon Kim, (2023) The influence of subjective visibility on illusory contour perception: An EEG study, Cognitive Neuroscience Symposium, CNS, SFA, USA
3.  **Oliver James**, WoongBi Lee, and Heung-No Lee. (2013). Random Transmittance Based Filter Array Spectrometers: Sparse Spectrum Recovery And Resolution Improvement. Global Conference on Signal and Information Processing (GlobalSIP), 2013 IEEE, 615–615. IEEE.
4.  **Oliver James**, WoongBi Lee, Sangjun Park, and Heung-No Lee. (2013a). A new signal processing technique for improving resolution of spectrometers. 한국통신학회 학술대회논문집, 62–63.
5.  WoongBi Lee, **Oliver James**, Sangjun Park, and Heung-No Lee. (2013). Random optical scatter filters for spectrometers: Implementation and Estimation. Imaging Systems and Applications, JTu4A-33. Optica Publishing Group.
6.  **Oliver James**, Sangjun Park, WoongBi Lee, and Heung-No Lee. (2013). Evaluation of resolution improvement capability of a DSP technique for filter-array-based spectrometers. Korean Information and Communication Society Journal, (6), 497–502.
7.  **Oliver James**, and Heung-No Lee. (2011). A realistic distributed compressive sensing framework for multiple wireless sensor networks. Proc. 4th Signal Process. with Adapt. Sparse Struct. Repr, 105.
8.  **Oliver James**., Aravind, R., and Prabhu, K. M. M. (2010). Pilot sequence design for improving OFDM channel estimation in the presence of CFO. 2010 International Conference on Signal Processing and Communications (SPCOM), 1–5. IEEE.
9.  **Oliver James**., Aravind, R., and Prabhu, K. M. M. (2009). Improved channel estimation in OFDM systems in the presence of CFO. 2009 15th Asia-Pacific Conference on Communications, 398–401. IEEE.
10. **Oliver James**, R. Shantha Selva Kumari, and V. Sadasivam, (2005). Wavelets for improving spectral efficiency in a digital communication system. Sixth International Conference on Computational Intelligence and Multimedia Applications (ICCIMA’05), 198–203. IEEE.

## Patents

### International

1.  Heung-No Lee, **Oliver James**, Sang-Jun Park, and Woong-Bi Lee, Method and Apparatus for Processing Optical Signal Of Spectrometer Using Sparse Nature of Signals, US patent number: 13,711,930, Reg. date: 2015-05-12; Patent Technology Classification: GO1J3/51; GO1J3/513; (Contribution 30%).
2.  Heung-No Lee, **Oliver James**, and Woong-Bi Lee, Apparatus for Improving Spectral Resolution using Random Transmittance in Optical Spectrometers, Japan patent number: 6290905, Reg. date: 2018-02-16; Patent Technology Classification: G01J3/02; (Contribution 30%).

### Domestic

1.  Heung-No Lee, **Oliver James**, and Woong-Bi Lee, Spectrometry apparatus and spectrometry method, No. PCT/KR2013/009014, Reg. date: 2014-04-17. Patent Technology Classification: G01J3/02; (Contribution 30%).
